title: 400ml Unbreakable Reusable Drinking Cup, Plastic Coffee, Tea, Water, Beer, Milk, Juice Cup for Adults, Set of 4 Mug Sets, Dishwasher and Microwave Safe
features: ✅ Food-grade PP Material - Greentainer Drinking Cup are made of food-grade PP material, they are unbreakable, lightweight and food grade.Cups are stack-able to conserve space and the round design, no dead angle.

✅ Microwave and Dishwasher Safe - Temperature resistant from -20℃ to 120℃. Cold or hot drinks such as As a water cup, milk cup, lemonade cup, juice cup, coffee cup, cappuccino cup, cocoa cup, tea cup, toothbrush cup
✅ Large Capacity and Lightweight - it can hold 13.5 ounces of liquid and the weight just 65g per tumblerful, great for travel or camping. It also can be a gargle cup or toothbrush holder

✅Multiple -use Assorted Colors - Beautiful colours, an attractive shape and a modern design make these cups perfect for all occasions, from a cozy cup of tea in bed to a sociable coffee party with friends. They attract attention with their timeless design and are compatible with any table decoration.

✅ Service & Promise | Thousands of customers around the world are already looking forward to our healthy, practical products every day. Product quality and the best customer service distinguish us, we are always there for you! We look forward to your order!
